title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India Digital Technologies - Top MNC
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the State Bank of India Digital Technologies family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
